# Fixture coverage allowlist — pre-existing rules that lack a positive
# or negative fixture under tests/fixtures/. The fixture-coverage test
# fails if a rule NOT on this list is missing a fixture, OR if an entry
# on this list now has the fixture (so the list shrinks as debt is paid
# down). Format: "<positive|negative> <RuleID>", sorted, one per line.
#
# To add a fixture for an entry below: drop the .kt under
# tests/fixtures/<positive|negative>/<category>/<RuleID>.kt and remove
# the corresponding line.
#
# Adding a NEW rule? Ship its fixtures with it; do not add it here.

negative AccidentalOctal
negative AdapterViewChildrenResource
negative AllProjectsBlock
negative AllowBackupManifest
negative AlwaysShowActionResource
negative AndroidGradlePluginVersion
negative AppCompatMethod
negative AppCompatResource
negative AppIndexingErrorManifest
negative AppIndexingWarningManifest
negative ApplyPluginTwice
negative Assert
negative BackButtonResource
negative BackupRules
negative ButtonCaseResource
negative ButtonOrderResource
negative ButtonStyleResource
negative CheckResult
negative CleartextTraffic
negative ClickableViewAccessibilityResource
negative CompileSdkMismatchAcrossModules
negative ConfigurationsAllSideEffect
negative ConventionPluginAppliedToWrongTarget
negative ConventionPluginDeadCode
